display.purpose: Page heroes and primary headlines. Playfair Display at its largest and most impactful.

headline.purpose: Section headings within pages. Structures the page into scannable blocks.

title.purpose: Subsection headings, card titles. The smallest size that carries serif authority.

body.purpose: All paragraph text. DM Sans for maximum readability.

label.purpose: Section labels, metadata, category tags. Uppercase, tracked wide.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover state. Paired with translateY(-1px).

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Accessibility focus indicator on all interactive elements.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for nav underlines, overlay transitions, and hamburger animation.

motion.name: t-fast
motion.purpose: Quick state changes: button hover, link color, focus ring.

motion.name: t-med
motion.purpose: Longer transitions: nav underline scale, overlay opacity, hamburger morph.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button. Healing Elm background, white text, gently rounded.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; background: #2e9582; color: #fff; border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 32px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #267a6b; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(46, 149, 130, 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(46, 149, 130, 0.4); }

components.name: Warm Button
components.description: Secondary emphasis with emotional warmth. Golden Hour tones for featured CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-warm { display: inline-block; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; background: #fcf4d7; color: #79641e; border: 2px solid #f7e5a8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 32px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-warm:hover { background: #f7e5a8; border-color: #f0d67a; } .ds-btn-warm:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(46, 149, 130, 0.4); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Lower-priority actions alongside a Primary button. Transparent with Elm border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-block; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; background: transparent; color: #267a6b; border: 2px solid #a6ddd3; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 32px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #44ae9c; background: #eef8f6; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(46, 149, 130, 0.4); }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Sticky frosted-glass header with logo, links, and compact CTA.
components.html:
• Solutions
  • Learn
  • About
Talk to Us
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; background: rgba(253,249,243,0.92); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(204,201,199,0.25); padding: 0 48px; height: 72px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-nav-logo { text-decoration: none; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 36px; list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .ds-nav-links a { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #5f5b58; text-decoration: none; position: relative; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-nav-links a::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px; background: #2e9582; border-radius: 1px; transform: scaleX(0); transition: transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: #267a6b; } .ds-nav-links a:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); } .ds-nav-active { color: #267a6b !important; font-weight: 600 !important; } .ds-nav-active::after { transform: scaleX(1) !important; } .ds-nav-cta { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; background: #2e9582; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #267a6b; }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Uppercase tracked section label. Sets context before a headline.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #2e9582; display: block; margin-bottom: 16px; }

components.name: Icon Background Tile
components.description: Tinted rounded-square background behind outlined icons. Signature Kingsfoil pattern.
components.css: .ds-icon-tile { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 25%; } .ds-icon-tile--green { background: #eef8f6; } .ds-icon-tile--blue { background: #f0f4f9; } .ds-icon-tile--gold { background: #fefbf0; } .ds-icon-tile--neutral { background: #f2f0ef; }

components.name: Footer
components.description: Dark footer with 4-column grid, white logo, and warm stone text.

components.css: .ds-footer { background: #262324; color: #ccc9c7; border-top: 1px solid #333130; padding: 64px 48px 32px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; } .ds-footer-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 48px; max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; } .ds-footer-brand { margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-footer-tagline { font-style: italic; color: #736f6c; margin-top: 8px; font-size: 14px; } .ds-footer-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-footer-col h4 { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #736f6c; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-footer-col a { display: block; color: #a8a4a1; text-decoration: none; padding: 10px 0; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-footer-col a:hover { color: #44ae9c; }

narrative.overview:
The feeling of sitting across from an advisor in warm, late-afternoon light — someone who already understands your problem and has a plan. Not a sales pitch. Not a corporate presentation. A calm, knowledgeable conversation where possibilities open up and anxiety recedes.

Kingsfoil Health's visual system draws from the brand archetypes of Sage (authority, clarity, insight) and Caregiver (warmth, advocacy, protection). The palette is grounded in nature — healing greens, deep sapphires, golden hour warmth — set against warm cream surfaces that feel like good paper, not cold screens. Typography pairs Playfair Display's editorial sophistication with DM Sans' clean readability: refinement without pretension.

This system explicitly rejects the visual language of generic insurance: no sterile blues, no stock handshakes, no corporate glass towers, no fear-based imagery, no saccharine optimism. It also rejects startup-bro aesthetics — no purple gradients, no neon accents, no cards-in-cards SaaS templates.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream surfaces with generous negative space (never white, never gray)
Serif headlines that convey editorial authority, not decoration
Color used with discipline — Elm Green leads, Gold accents, Sapphire supports
Photography feels like natural light through windows, not studio flash
Components feel approachable but decisive — gently curved, confidently filled
Every page has room to breathe (30-40% negative space minimum)

rules.name: The Warm Undertone Rule
rules.body: Every neutral in the system has a warm undertone. Cold grays are prohibited. Blue-tinted grays break the Golden Hour atmosphere.

rules.name: The Elm Leads Rule
rules.body: Elm Green is the only color permitted on primary CTAs. Gold accents, Sapphire informs, Elm acts.

rules.name: The Serif Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Playfair Display is never used below 20px rendered size. Below that threshold, the serifs lose their refinement and become visual noise.

rules.name: The No-Decoration Rule
rules.body: Playfair Display is never used for decorative purposes. It earns its presence by communicating something.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, focus). Use tinted surface colors or subtle borders for separation, never resting shadows.

dos: Do use Warm Cream (#fdf9f3) as the primary page surface — never pure white or cool gray.
Do maintain 30-40% negative space in all compositions.
Do use natural-light photography with warm undertones.
Do place subjects off-center following the rule of thirds, with clear copy space.
Do use Elm Green exclusively for primary actions.
Do use slightly desaturated photography that naturally aligns with the warm palette.
Do keep body text at 65-75 characters per line maximum.
Do use organic shapes at 3-6% opacity for subtle background texture.
Do show real diversity in photography reflecting the actual American workforce.
donts: Don't use stock photo clichés: stethoscope-on-keyboard, handshake closeups, people high-fiving, arms-crossed power poses.
Don't use sterile hospital or clinical imagery.
Don't use overly corporate settings (glass towers, massive conference rooms, suits).
Don't use fear or anxiety imagery.
Don't use cold blue color grading.
Don't apply purple-to-blue gradients, neon accents, or glassmorphism.
Don't use resting shadows on surfaces.
Don't use 'trusted partner,' 'synergy,' 'leverage,' or hollow corporate language.
Don't use any imagery that could appear on any other insurance broker's website.
